subcodes.title: Words to a young girl from Scotland studying painting, spoken on 1913-05-07
subcodes.first_line: His Holiness Bahá'u'lláh has commanded the study of arts and crafts; that when we undertake the study of any branch of arts we must perfect ourselves in it
subcodes.subjects: @literature; drama; humanities; the arts, @spiritual transformation, @high station of the arts and sciences, @bringing oneself to account each day, @martyrs and martyrdom
